title: URGENT - Investigate Online Scheduler Infinite Load on Book Online Today Button
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Keith Bruss, Myroslav Abdeljawwad, Predrag
description:
The AM has marked this as URGENT. Please move this Review/QA as soon as this is completed and tag me.

cc  

____________________________________

Domain: callthechamps.com

Primary URL: https://www.callthechamps.com — the "Book Online Today" button/scheduler trigger on the hero and in the nav

Summary: The client reported that their online scheduler is not loading when clicking "Book Online Today" — it is stuck in an infinite load. The client emailed their scheduler vendor (Brad) and CC'd Clixsy asking for assistance. We need to investigate whether anything on our side could be contributing to the issue and resolve or report findings.

Client Goal: The client wants their online booking functionality restored and working as expected for site visitors.

Requirements for Completion:
  • The "Book Online Today" button/scheduler has been tested and the source of the infinite load has been identified if possible
  • If a Clixsy-side cause is found, it has been resolved or a clear recommendation has been documented
  • AM has been notified of findings so the client can be updated accordingly
Deadline: Client flagged as urgent — no hard deadline stated, but prompt investigation is expected.

Assets and References:
  • Client email: "hey Brad, I tested our online scheduler today and it's not loading. I also cc our marketing company can you look into this?"

description: We need to check the GBP and LSA phone numbers and ensure that they all lead to Champion Plumbing.

title: Champion Plumbing Potential Redesign
description:
Hey guys, we're looking at potentially redesigning Champion Plumbing. We need to look at how much work that would be.

https://callthechamps.com/

We ideally want to know...
  • Identify the current theme
  • Identify the page templates used on the site
  • Crawl of the site (what we usually do for site rebuilds)
  • Check for potential complications with functionality, scripts, plugins, etc.
We don't need to look super deep into it, whatever we can find by running crawls, AI, and pulling from our knowledge of what we've seen while working on the site.

title: Calls are down
description:
Hi seeking help please. We got a ticket that the client is reporting that their calls are down. Please check for any odd drops in rankings or other reasons calls may have dropped. 

Please do let us know if we need more info, we can seek help from their AM. Or if ever we need a number audit from the Dev team. 

I was checking the SEO leads and I saw Dino is for this client, but I cannot seem to add/tag/assign it to him. I saw Naas' name in one of the SEO tasks so assigning it to him for now. But please do feel free to assign it to the right SEO lead if needed :) 

Thanks much!

title: Auto responses to reviews
description:
Context: Leslie's previous agency had some fuction built using GHL that monitored her reviews, gave her a report (idk if it was weekly or monthly) also was able to report which of her technicians got the review (so she could give incentives and bonuses for performance), and lastly it somehow had a queue of automated responses that they would somehow reply to each new review on the GBPs.

I know we're working on the auto-reply feature. Could you give me a sense of how far out a working beta of that might be?

Would Randy know how to replicate this functionality ? I believe she did get her campaigns exported. Perhaps he'd be interested in helping us get something in place until our software has those features?

title: GBP Phone Numbers
description:
Hey ,

Do you have any information on whether the GBP numbers are all unique local numbers or GBP tracking numbers, by chance? I wanted to check in with you before we go to the client in case this info is already housed somewhere that I am not privy to.

None of the numbers appear on the site, as there are no numbers alongside the address in the footer.
Besides one "contact us" number (405-725-1534).

title: Call volume down
description:
Seeking help, we got a ticket that the client  reporting that its call volume is noticeably down.

Can we please check their contact forms and numbers on the site to make sure this isn't something breaking?

I also added SEO to the task for further help. I cannot see the SEO manager yet so I added Clayton for now.

Thanks much.

CC

title: Reviews to the GBPs
description:
The client would like to send the reviews to a single location to be able to track reviews simply and easily for the month of August.

Can you please look and advise which location to direct those reviews to?

title: Agency Analytics Reports
description:
The client is looking for a way to be able to easily see recent reviews across all locations, to be able to track the reviews her technicians are getting, and for an internal contest to drive reviews. Can we use agency analytics to send a report of the reviews over a certain period? Also, what kind of filtering options does agency analytics have? Can she filter by a technician's name?

Let me know if you need more context.

title: Implement Gas Line Repair Page Optimization (Champion Plumbing – Edmond, OK)
description:
Summary:
We optimized the Gas Line Repair service page on callthechamps.com for stronger local and semantic SEO performance.
The update aligns the page with high-intent keywords — gas line repair, gas line replacement, gas leak repair, and Edmond OK — to improve relevance, authority, and search visibility.


What we did:


  • Rewrote on-page copy for clarity and entity alignment (repair + replacement + installation).


  • Added optimized title tag and meta description for local CTR.


  • Built and installed a comprehensive schema including:


    • PlumbingService (LocalBusiness)


    • Multiple Service nodes (repair, replacement, installation, leak detection)


    • FAQPage for enhanced SERP rich results


    • BreadcrumbList and WebPage structure for better crawlability.


  • Ensured full compliance with semantic SEO and structured-data best practices.


Goal:
Increase topical authority and click-through rates for gas-related plumbing services in Edmond and the Oklahoma City area.

    • Address
    • Phone number
    • Message lead number
    • Business hours
    • Listed attorneys

title: Implement completed dashboard
description:
1. Create a vanity URL using Rebrandly.com (format: /ClientName)
  2. Add completed dashboard link to the Master Sheet in the client's "LSA DIRECTORY" line
  3. Add the dashboard as a door on the project
  4. Ensure the dashboard is set to "Unlisted"
TUTORIAL

title: Welcome Email
description: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1s9-e7o19rttsfSAGtPf3J7CPr_VigrUkW5089s9CXBQ/edit?usp=sharing

title: Forward client to rep for review
description:
Submit a review request to our Google rep using the REP REQUESTS SHEET

Paste findings under the "Audit Review Call" task to be reviewed on the call

TUTORIAL

title: Add client to LSA Master Sheet
description:
MASTER SHEET

This includes:
  1. Adding the client to the "LSA DIRECTORY" tab
  2. Adding the client's master sheet tab to the project and linking it accordingly in the directory

TUTORIAL

title: Establish LSA Access
description:
1. Pull the CID from the onboarding form (found under "CLIENT WORKBOOK" door on the project's front page, then the "Project Details" tab. Should be ROW 28.)
  2. Send a management request using the Google Ads interface. TUTORIAL
  3. Verify that the management request was sent. TUTORIAL
  4. Send the client an email advising them to look out for the management request. >>> USE THIS EMAIL TEMPLATE <<<
  5. Check this off once the client has accepted the management request.
